attributes.name: [Oracle WebLogic OTel] High JVM heap utilization

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracle_weblogic.otel-*
| WHERE weblogic.jvm.heap.size IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    heap_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.size)),
    heap_free = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.free)),
    heap_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(weblogic.jvm.heap.max))
  BY attributes.server
| EVAL heap_used = heap_size - heap_free
| WHERE heap_max > 0
| EVAL heap_util_pct = ROUND(heap_used / heap_max * 100.0, 2)
// Adjust threshold based on your JVM tuning and GC strategy
// 90% is a reasonable default; lower for latency-sensitive applications
| WHERE heap_util_pct > 90.0
| SORT heap_util_pct DESC
